svg.title: 999BBQ Class Diagram
svg.desc: UML-style class diagram for the 999BBQ KBBQ food shop application showing interfaces, enums, abstract classes, and inheritance
svg.text: Prices follow capstone table — Small / Medium / Large
AYCE (special option): additional flat charge TBD
Receipts saved to /receipts/yyyyMMdd-hhmmss.txt · Gemini API called on-demand per menu item
GitHub branches: main · feature/gemini-ai · feature/screens · feature/ordering · feature/receipt
